user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship
fields.description: Stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship store to purchase souvenirs and gifts before heading to the CN Tower.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants to shop for souvenirs in the morning before visiting the CN Tower. Placing this stop after breakfast and before the CN Tower EdgeWalk ensures it fits within the morning schedule.
